Moqhaka

Cat B · Local

Free State · MIIF B2 · FS201

Moqhaka is a Category B local municipality in Free State, South Africa (Stats SA code FS201). The 2022 Census recorded a population of 155 410 — the 5th most populous of 19 municipalities in the province. Population declined by 0.3% between the 2011 and 2022 censuses (boundary-aligned figures). On basic services: 90.9% of households live in formal dwellings; 91.7% have access to a flush toilet; 84.3% use electricity for cooking. The municipal area covers 7 925 km² at a density of 19.6 people per km². All figures below are from Stats SA Census 2022 Municipal Fact Sheets.

Municipality Insights

Population declined by -0.3% between 2011 and 2022.

Formal housing (90.9%) is 3.0 percentage points above the provincial average.

Population density (19.6 /km²) is significantly below the national municipal average of 117.7 /km².

Flush toilet access (91.7%) is 9.7 percentage points above the provincial average.

SA Data Hub

A modern, accessible platform for exploring South African public data. Built to make government statistics understandable for everyone.

Data sourced from Statistics South Africa, SARB, SAPS and other official bodies. Not affiliated with any government department.
